Video.summary: An Australian Shepherd behaves aggressively after being attacked by a couple of dogs; a shelter dog won't stop biting and snapping at potential owners.
Video.title: Not-So-Sweet Snickers

Video.summary: Mufasa, a South African boerboel, became aggressive after being pinned down by another dog; Tucker, a teacup poodle, behavior becomes more aggressive.
Video.title: Rockin' the Boat

Video.summary: A Pekingese who refuses to eat or drink; a Chihuahua who bites people; two chow mixes who share a home but won't play nice with each other.
Video.title: Blood Brothers

Video.summary: At an army base, Cesar helps an Australian shepherd scared of men in uniform and a Shetland shepherd who barks non-stop when planes fly overhead.
Video.title: Army Brats

Video.summary: An aggressive Manchester Terrier; a Wheaton Terrier with poor social skills; a dog who is afraid of the ocean.
Video.title: Beach Blues

Video.summary: A great Dane bites her owner; a bearded collie with dog aggression; a mouthy French mastiff.
Video.title: Cesar Down Under

Video.summary: Two German shepherds who get along fine at home, but are at each other's throats when at daycare; a miniature schnauzer that barks when her owner's grandchildren visit.
Video.title: Mission: Control

Video.summary: Aggressive bulldog Hugo is sent to canine rehab; Crusty must overcome his dominance issues if he's ever going to enjoy walks.
Video.title: Bull-Whipped

Video.summary: An aggressive lab-mastiff mix; a Jack Russell mix that barks obsessively; a woman is concerned at her dog's habit of barking and growling at people.
Video.title: Attacking Cujo

Video.summary: A dogo Argentino with canine aggression; a terrier/corgi mix who becomes aggressive when faced with traveling.
Video.title: Warrior Dog

Video.summary: A dog trained to sniff out contraband cell phones in prisons is unable to do his job due to his skittish nature; a dog is terrified of hot air balloons.
Video.title: K-9 Behind Bars

Video.summary: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.
Video.title: Family Feud

Video.summary: Two Jack Russell terriers, Ruby and Jinx, show how dogs communicate through energy and body language.
Video.title: Why Dogs Fight

Video.summary: Stella is a bulldog mascot for a dog-friendly café; a German shepherd who barks too loud, and two aggressive miniature pinschers.
Video.title: Mascot Mayhem

Video.summary: A dog with an abusive past fears men; a Border Collie mix refuses to leave his chair and is afraid of leashes.
Video.title: Killer in the Window

Video.summary: Nate Brouwer and Charnae Wright bonded through their love of dogs and the outdoors, but their feuding dogs are threatening to tear them apart.
Video.title: No Man's Land

Video.summary: A couple with three unruly dogs, one with aggression issues; a poodle who fears the back door since running into the screen door; a Weimaraner who is territorial and aggressive.
Video.title: Closet Cases

Video.summary: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.
Video.title: The Dog Squad

Video.summary: A woman's French bulldog exhibits people aggression that started for no apparent reason when he turned two years old.
Video.title: Hardy: Attacked With Love

Video.summary: Life coach and fitness trainer Jillian Michaels can whip contestants on the "Biggest Loser" television series into shape, but she's at a loss when it comes to her dog; escape artist dog; dog dislikes brooms and windshield wipers.
Video.title: The Hairy Houdini

Video.summary: A Weimaraner is aggressive towards anyone who turns on one of the motorized bikes used to deliver the mail; an aggressive shar-pei; an Australian red cattle dog who barks incessantly.
Video.title: Cesar in Oz

Video.summary: A family's new Great Dane moves in on its other dog's territory; Cesar helps Los Angeles' animal-control department with its new pet-ownership program.
Video.title: Great Pains

Video.summary: A pit bull/chow mix has an extreme fear of the stove; a Rottweiler and a German shepherd battle for control; a Jack Russell terrier cannot handle the loss of its pack leader.
Video.title: Cat Worshipper

Video.summary: A feral dog refuses to be caught; the addition of an English bulldog disrupts the harmonious relationship of a boxer and a cocker spaniel; a pit bull terrier refuses to go for walks.
Video.title: Pooch Potato
